title: check_message
description: Scan a message for prompt injection, jailbreak attempts, social engineering, and other agent threats. Based on the Agent Threat Rules (ATR) standard. Returns matched rules, severity, and recommended mitigations.

content.description: The message content to scan for threats

context.description: Where this message came from — affects which rules apply

sensitivity.description: Minimum severity threshold to report. 'low' reports everything, 'critical' only reports critical threats
